creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
thanks for reporting this but there's not enough info to progress this ticket as is. You can use recon's ./script/erl_crashdump_analyzer.sh to debug failures https://github.com/ferd/recon/blob/master/script/erl_crashdump_analyzer.sh

```

analyzing /tmp/crash.dump, generated on:  Fri Jan 4 20:11:16 2019 

Slogan: init terminating in do_boot ({load_failed,[error_handler]})

Memory:
===
  processes: 3 Mb
  processes_used: 3 Mb
  system: 18 Mb
  atom: 0 Mb
  atom_used: 0 Mb
  binary: 0 Mb
  code: 0 Mb
  ets: 0 Mb
  ---
  total: 21 Mb

Error logger queue length:
===

  TCP:  0
  Files:  0

  Total:  0

===

Processes Heap+Stack memory sizes (words) used in the VM (5 largest different):
===
   1 987
   1 610
   6 233

Processes OldHeap memory sizes (words) used in the VM (5 largest different):
===
   1 987
   1 376
   1 OldHeap unused: 983
   1 OldHeap unused: 140
   6 OldHeap unused: 0

Process States when crashing (sum): 
===
   1 CONNECTED
   1 Current Process Internal ACT_PRIO_NORMAL | USR_PRIO_NORMAL | PRQ_PRIO_NORMAL | ACTIVE | RUNNING | ACTIVE_SYS
   1 Current Process Running
   1 Internal ACT_PRIO_HIGH | USR_PRIO_HIGH | PRQ_PRIO_HIGH | OFF_HEAP_MSGQ
   1 Internal ACT_PRIO_MAX | USR_PRIO_MAX | PRQ_PRIO_MAX | OFF_HEAP_MSGQ
   2 Internal ACT_PRIO_NORMAL | USR_PRIO_NORMAL | PRQ_PRIO_NORMAL
   1 Internal ACT_PRIO_NORMAL | USR_PRIO_NORMAL | PRQ_PRIO_NORMAL | ACTIVE | RUNNING | ACTIVE_SYS
   3 Internal ACT_PRIO_NORMAL | USR_PRIO_NORMAL | PRQ_PRIO_NORMAL | OFF_HEAP_MSGQ
   1 Running
   7 Waiting
```

There's nothing here couchdb specific and error handler is pretty early in the startup sequence, so I am speculating that either your erlang version doesn't match what couchdb is build with, *or* less likely the permissions on runtime dirs isn't correct.

- are all packages from pkg.freebsd.org or are you building from ports? if so, how?
- if you take (e.g. a jail) a fresh system and start couchdb with a default configuration, does it work?
- check /var/{log,run,db}/couchdb2 permissions match couchdb:couchdb 0750 at least
